Q16.title: 年齡與倍數推算
Q16.questionText: 小莎向他的哥哥說：「你比我大 10 歲。」她的哥哥說：「妳說對了，我的年齡是妳的三倍。」請問小莎幾歲？
Q16.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 500 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><rect x='20' y='20' width='460' height='160' rx='10' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2'/><text x='40' y='70' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>哥哥 =</text><rect x='120' y='45' width='80' height='35' rx='5' fill='#fca5a5' /><text x='160' y='68' text-anchor='middle' font-size='18' font-weight='bold' fill='#7f1d1d'>小莎</text><text x='225' y='70' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>+</text><rect x='250' y='45' width='210' height='35' rx='5' fill='#cbd5e1' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2'/><text x='355' y='68' text-anchor='middle' font-size='18' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>10 歲</text><text x='40' y='140' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>哥哥 =</text><rect x='120' y='115' width='80' height='35' rx='5' fill='#fca5a5' /><text x='160' y='138' text-anchor='middle' font-size='18' font-weight='bold' fill='#7f1d1d'>小莎</text><text x='225' y='140' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>+</text><rect x='250' y='115' width='80' height='35' rx='5' fill='#fca5a5' /><text x='290' y='138' text-anchor='middle' font-size='18' font-weight='bold' fill='#7f1d1d'>小莎</text><text x='355' y='140' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>+</text><rect x='380' y='115' width='80' height='35' rx='5' fill='#fca5a5' /><text x='420' y='138' text-anchor='middle' font-size='18' font-weight='bold' fill='#7f1d1d'>小莎</text><line x1='250' y1='85' x2='250' y2='110' stroke='#ef4444' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><line x1='460' y1='85' x2='460' y2='110' stroke='#ef4444' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：列出年齡關係
steps.content:
條件一：哥哥的年齡 = 小莎的年齡 + 10 歲。
條件二：哥哥的年齡 = 3 個小莎的年齡總和。

steps.title: 步驟二：對齊比較並求解
steps.content:
將兩者互相對照，3 個小莎的年齡剛好等於 1 個小莎加上 10 歲。
這代表多出來的 2 個小莎 的年紀加起來剛好等於 10 歲。
所以小莎是 10 ÷ 2 = 5 歲，選擇 (B)。

Q17.title: 圖形覆蓋與面積
Q17.questionText: 請問共需要用多少片塗色的小瓷磚才能夠將右圖所示的十字形鋪滿？
Q17.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 500 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><g transform='translate(20, 40)'><text x='70' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>1片小瓷磚</text><polygon points='40,80 100,80 70,50' fill='#ef4444' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/></g><path d='M 120 100 Q 180 80 265 110' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrB)'/><text x='180' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold' fill='#0ea5e9'>對應至 8 片中的 1 片</text><g transform='translate(220, 20)'><polygon points='60,60 120,60 120,0 180,0 180,60 240,60 240,120 180,120 180,180 120,180 120,120 60,120' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='120' y1='60' x2='120' y2='120' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='180' y1='60' x2='180' y2='120' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='120' y1='60' x2='180' y2='60' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='120' y1='120' x2='180' y2='120' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='60' y1='60' x2='120' y2='120' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><line x1='60' y1='120' x2='120' y2='60' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><line x1='90' y1='60' x2='90' y2='120' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><line x1='60' y1='90' x2='120' y2='90' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><polygon points='60,90 90,90 60,120' fill='#ef4444' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/></g><defs><marker id='arrB' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='5' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z' fill='#0ea5e9' /></marker></defs></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：對應圖形切割
steps.content: 觀察左邊那一小片三角形，若我們將右邊十字架的「一個正方形」畫上對角線和十字線，會發現一個正方形剛好可以被切成 8 個 一模一樣的小三角形。

steps.title: 步驟二：計算全部有幾片
steps.content:
整個十字架共有 5 個相同的正方形。
全部的小三角形數量 = 5 個正方形 × 每格 8 片 = 40 片。
所以鋪滿整個圖形共需要 40 片小瓷磚，選擇 (E)。

Q18.title: 數字配對與邏輯推理
Q18.questionText: 小舒有編號 1 到 7 的卡片。她正確地將它們放進三條算式中。請問她將會留下哪一張卡片？
Q18.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 500 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><defs><linearGradient id='cardGrad' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='0%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#1e3a8a' /><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#1e40af' /></linearGradient><filter id='shadow'><feDropShadow dx='2' dy='2' stdDeviation='2' flood-color='#000' flood-opacity='0.3'/></filter></defs><g transform='translate(60, 30)'><rect x='30' y='10' width='36' height='42' rx='6' fill='url(#cardGrad)' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2' filter='url(#shadow)'/><text x='48' y='38' text-anchor='middle' font-size='22' font-weight='bold' fill='#fff'>1</text><rect x='80' y='10' width='36' height='42' rx='6' fill='url(#cardGrad)' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2' filter='url(#shadow)'/><text x='98' y='38' text-anchor='middle' font-size='22' font-weight='bold' fill='#fff'>2</text><rect x='5' y='65' width='36' height='42' rx='6' fill='url(#cardGrad)' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2' filter='url(#shadow)'/><text x='23' y='93' text-anchor='middle' font-size='22' font-weight='bold' fill='#fff'>3</text><rect x='55' y='65' width='36' height='42' rx='6' fill='url(#cardGrad)' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2' filter='url(#shadow)'/><text x='73' y='93' text-anchor='middle' font-size='22' font-weight='bold' fill='#fff'>4</text><rect x='105' y='65' width='36' height='42' rx='6' fill='url(#cardGrad)' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2' filter='url(#shadow)'/><text x='123' y='93' text-anchor='middle' font-size='22' font-weight='bold' fill='#fff'>5</text><rect x='30' y='120' width='36' height='42' rx='6' fill='url(#cardGrad)' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2' filter='url(#shadow)'/><text x='48' y='148' text-anchor='middle' font-size='22' font-weight='bold' fill='#fff'>6</text><rect x='80' y='120' width='36' height='42' rx='6' fill='url(#cardGrad)' stroke='#ef4444' stroke-width='3' filter='url(#shadow)'/><text x='98' y='148' text-anchor='middle' font-size='22' font-weight='bold' fill='#ef4444'>7</text></g><g transform='translate(260, 40)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='36' height='42' rx='4' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4,2'/><text x='55' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>×</text><rect x='74' y='0' width='36' height='42' rx='4' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4,2'/><text x='145' y='28' text-anchor='middle' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>= 12</text><text x='210' y='26' font-size='16' fill='#0ea5e9' font-weight='bold'>→ 填 3, 4</text><rect x='0' y='55' width='36' height='42' rx='4' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4,2'/><text x='55' y='83' text-anchor='middle' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>+</text><rect x='74' y='55' width='36' height='42' rx='4' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4,2'/><text x='145' y='83' text-anchor='middle' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>= 11</text><text x='210' y='81' font-size='16' fill='#0ea5e9' font-weight='bold'>→ 填 5, 6</text><rect x='0' y='110' width='36' height='42' rx='4' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4,2'/><text x='55' y='138' text-anchor='middle' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>-</text><rect x='74' y='110' width='36' height='42' rx='4' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4,2'/><text x='140' y='138' text-anchor='middle' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>= 1</text><text x='210' y='136' font-size='16' fill='#0ea5e9' font-weight='bold'>→ 填 2, 1</text></g></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：分析乘法 (注意陷阱)
steps.content:
1到7相乘等於12的組合有「3×4」與「2×6」。
⚠️ 為何不能選 2×6？
若填 2,6，第二行加法=11 只能用 4+7，此時剩下 1,3,5 根本無法相減得到 1。所以第一行必定只能填 3 × 4。

steps.title: 步驟二：處理加法與減法
steps.content:
乘法用掉 3、4。剩下的數字 (1,2,5,6,7) 中，相加等於 11 的組合必定是 5 + 6。
最後剩下 1、2、7。能相減等於 1 的組合只有 2 - 1 = 1。
三條算式填滿後，唯一沒用到的是卡片 7，選擇 (E)。

Q19.title: 反射路徑與規律
Q19.questionText: 警衛從房間中央以 45° 角射出光束，光束在鏡子間來回反射。直到射回警衛為止，總共反射多少次？
Q19.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 500 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><rect x='50' y='80' width='400' height='80' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4'/><text x='250' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' fill='#64748b'>10 m</text><text x='30' y='125' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' fill='#64748b'>2 m</text><circle cx='50' cy='120' r='6' fill='#1e293b'/><text x='30' y='145' font-size='12' font-weight='bold'>警衛</text><polyline points='50,120 90,160 170,80 250,160 330,80 410,160 450,120' fill='none' stroke='#eab308' stroke-width='3'/><polyline points='450,120 410,80 330,160 250,80 170,160 90,80 50,120' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><line x1='330' y1='20' x2='360' y2='20' stroke='#eab308' stroke-width='3'/><text x='370' y='25' font-size='12' font-weight='bold'>去程</text><line x1='410' y1='20' x2='440' y2='20' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><text x='450' y='25' font-size='12' font-weight='bold'>回程</text><circle cx='90' cy='160' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='90' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#ef4444' font-weight='bold'>1</text><circle cx='250' cy='160' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='250' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#ef4444' font-weight='bold'>3</text><circle cx='410' cy='160' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='410' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#ef4444' font-weight='bold'>5</text><circle cx='170' cy='80' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='170' y='70' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#ef4444' font-weight='bold'>2</text><circle cx='330' cy='80' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='330' y='70' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#ef4444' font-weight='bold'>4</text><circle cx='450' cy='120' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='470' y='125' font-size='12' fill='#ef4444' font-weight='bold'>6</text><circle cx='410' cy='80' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='410' y='70' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#0ea5e9' font-weight='bold'>7</text><circle cx='250' cy='80' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='250' y='70' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#0ea5e9' font-weight='bold'>9</text><circle cx='90' cy='80' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='90' y='70' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#0ea5e9' font-weight='bold'>11</text><circle cx='330' cy='160' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='330' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#0ea5e9' font-weight='bold'>8</text><circle cx='170' cy='160' r='5' fill='#ef4444'/> <text x='170' y='175' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' fill='#0ea5e9' font-weight='bold'>10</text></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：追蹤去程反射
steps.content: 光線以 45° 前進，每前進 2m 會在上下牆壁交替反射 1 次。到達對面牆壁 (10m) 的途中會反射 5 次，擊中對面牆壁正中央產生第 6 次反射。

steps.title: 步驟二：追蹤回程反射
steps.content:
光線撞擊垂直的對面牆後，會以交叉路徑返回。回程同樣會在上下牆壁交替反射 5 次，最後回到警衛手中。
總反射次數 = 去程 5 次 + 牆壁 1 次 + 回程 5 次 = 11 次，選擇 (D)。

Q20.title: 基礎代數與等量公理
Q20.questionText: 一個罐子與 30 枚珠子共重 115g，相同的罐子與 20 枚珠子共重 85g。請問這個空罐的重量是什麼？
Q20.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='-20 0 520 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><rect x='0' y='30' width='310' height='160' rx='10' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#e2e8f0' stroke-width='2'/><g transform='translate(10, 60)'><path d='M 0 30 L 0 0 Q 15 0 30 0 L 30 30 Z' fill='#94a3b8' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='45' y='22' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>+</text><circle cx='75' cy='15' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9'/><text x='95' y='22' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>× 30</text><text x='160' y='24' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>= 115g</text></g><g transform='translate(10, 130)'><text x='-15' y='22' font-size='28' font-weight='bold' fill='#ef4444'>-</text><path d='M 0 30 L 0 0 Q 15 0 30 0 L 30 30 Z' fill='#94a3b8' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='45' y='22' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>+</text><circle cx='75' cy='15' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9'/><text x='95' y='22' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>× 20</text><text x='160' y='24' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>=  85g</text></g><line x1='5' y1='175' x2='300' y2='175' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='3'/><g transform='translate(10, 205)'><circle cx='75' cy='0' r='10' fill='#0ea5e9'/><text x='95' y='7' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' fill='#ef4444'>× 10</text><text x='160' y='9' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='#ef4444'>=  30g</text></g><path d='M 280 80 Q 330 110 280 145' fill='none' stroke='#cbd5e1' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><rect x='330' y='60' width='150' height='100' rx='8' fill='#fef2f2' stroke='#ef4444' stroke-width='2'/><text x='405' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b'>相差 10 枚珠子</text><text x='405' y='120' text-anchor='middle' font-size='18' font-weight='bold' fill='#ef4444'>相差 30g</text><text x='405' y='145' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold' fill='#64748b'>1枚 = 3g</text></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：利用直式減法求出珠子重量
steps.content:
透過左邊的直式減法，罐子和罐子互相抵銷。
30 枚珠子減去 20 枚珠子剩下 10 枚，重量少了 115 - 85 = 30 克。
這代表 10 枚珠子重 30 克，所以 1 枚珠子重 3 克。

steps.title: 步驟二：代回求出空罐重量
steps.content:
既然 1 枚珠子重 3 克，那 20 枚珠子就是 20 × 3 = 60 克。
「罐子 + 20 枚珠子 = 85 克」，把 60 克的珠子重量扣掉：
空罐子 = 85 - 60 = 25 克，選擇 (C)。
